title: Wholesome Tunisian Chicken Tagine
description: Savory and creamy, this crowd-pleasing tagine blends lemons, a deglaze, and Ayurvedic low-tamasic spices for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a heavy pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Place chicken thighs in the pot and brown them on all sides, about 4 minutes per side.
Pour in tomato paste, swirling to coat the chicken and vegetables.
Add lemon juice and chicken broth, bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
Cover the pot and let the tagine cook for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in coconut milk and continue simmering for an additional 10 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning with more salt or lemon if needed.
